description: Mutate a malloc() call in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) by undercounting the element size multiplier, allocating a buffer too small for its intended element count and causing an out-of-bounds write.

metadata.notes: Targets malloc() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — reduces the allocation size argument to produce a heap buffer overflow on subsequent writes.
